{{Infobox character
| name = Twelve
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Twelve]] is also known as [[Yzara]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Twelve]] is a [[Champion]] who uses a massive [[sword]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Twelve]] is a [[Champion]] who was neutral and injured by [[Kern]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|"Twelve—or was it Yzara?—no longer looked so smug."<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
